subcodes.first_line: ...As for the signs of the coming of age of the human race mentioned in the Kitab-i-Aqdas: one sign is the advent of universal peace, and the other is the unfoldment and appearance of the 'sister of prophecy', the divine philosophy, of which the hidden craft forms a part
subcodes.first_line_orig: امّا علامت بلوغ عالم که در کتاب اقدس مرقوم یکی حصول صلح عمومی و دیگری ظهور و بروز اخت النّبوة حکمت الهّیه است که صنعتع مکتوبه جزو آن است
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @coming-of-age; maturity of mankind, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @consolation and comfort, @universal peace; world unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
